title: Native runtime does not verify rejected writes
description: Runs the native runtime against a scripted provider that attempts an invalid empty multi_edit, then proves the host rejects it before execution and does not run active verification.

acceptance.command: node -e "const fs=require('fs'); const text=fs.readFileSync('alpha.js','utf8'); const expected=Buffer.from('636f6e73742076616c7565203d202263757272656e74223b0a','hex').toString(); if (text !== expected) { console.error(text); process.exit(1); }"
